# TCLAS Theme Audit — March 5, 2026

Full usability, accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA), performance, and code quality review of the Clausen theme. Findings organized by severity with file locations.

---

## CRITICAL (fix before board preview)

### 1. Dead `href="#"` resource links (14 instances)
All resource links on MSP+LUX and Ancestry open a blank new tab or jump to page top.

| File | Lines | Links |
|------|-------|-------|
| `page-templates/page-msp-lux.php` | 265-276 | 6 links (Lux for Finance, Visit Lux, LACC, Portail.lu, Heritage Museum, MN Historical Society) |
| `page-templates/page-ancestry.php` | 118-131 | 8 links (ANLux, vdai.lu, Portail.lu, Genealogy Lux, FamilySearch, Ancestry.com, MN Historical, Heritage Museum) |

**Fix**: Replace with real URLs or remove `target="_blank"` and add "coming soon" text.

### 2. Directory page N+1 query pattern (~4,000+ DB queries)
`inc/member-profiles.php:239-269` — `tclas_get_directory_members()` runs 8+ individual meta queries per member inside a loop. At 500 members, that's 4,000+ queries on a single page load with no caching.

**Fix**: Add a transient cache for the result set, or use a bulk `usermeta` query to pre-fill the object cache.

### 3. Connection compute N+1 queries (~2,500 DB hits per user)
`inc/connections.php:304-369` — `tclas_compute_connections()` and `tclas_get_members_with_profiles()` query meta per candidate. Partially mitigated by 24-hour cache, but the immediate recompute on profile save (`tclas_save_member_story`) is unbounded.

**Fix**: Bulk-load all commune/surname meta into memory before the comparison loop.

### 4. Duplicate skip link rendered twice
`header.php:12` outputs `.tclas-skip-link`; `inc/accessibility.php:14` outputs `.skip-link` via `wp_body_open`. Keyboard users encounter two consecutive "Skip to main content" links.

**Fix**: Remove one. Keep the `_a11y.scss` version (`.skip-link`) and delete the one in `header.php`.

### 5. `outline: none` on form inputs overrides global focus style
`_forms.scss:47`, `_story.scss:48`, `_footer.scss:99`, `_pmpro.scss:92`, `_vendor.scss:136`, `_newsletter.scss:513` — bare `:focus` selectors with `outline: none` override the global `*:focus-visible` outline from `_a11y.scss:20`. Keyboard users lose visible focus on form fields. `_vendor.scss:136` uses `!important`, killing focus on PMPro checkout inputs entirely.

**Fix**: Change to `:focus-visible` selectors, or ensure replacement indicators (box-shadow/border) meet 3:1 contrast.

### 6. Hub sidebar mobile overlay lacks focus trap
`main.js:61-73` — sidebar opens with `is-open` class and `overflow: hidden` on body, but focus is not moved into the sidebar and can Tab behind the overlay. Missing `role="dialog"` and `aria-modal`.

**Fix**: Add focus trap (move focus in on open, trap Tab, return focus on close).

---

## IMPORTANT (fix before soft launch)

### 7. Footer text fails WCAG AA color contrast
`_footer.scss` — multiple text elements use low-opacity RGBA on `#2B6282`:

| Element | Line | Opacity | Contrast | Needs |
|---------|------|---------|----------|-------|
| `.tclas-footer__brand-tagline` | 41 | .55 | ~3.2:1 | 4.5:1 |
| `.tclas-footer__brand-desc` | 43 | .55 | ~3.2:1 | 4.5:1 |
| `.tclas-footer__motto` | 44 | .40 | ~2.4:1 | 4.5:1 |
| `.tclas-footer__nav a` | 64 | .65 | ~3.9:1 | 4.5:1 |
| `.tclas-footer__bottom` | 131 | .38 | ~2.3:1 | 4.5:1 |
| `.tclas-footer__bottom a` | 142 | .45 | ~2.7:1 | 4.5:1 |

**Fix**: Increase opacity values. Nav links need `.75`+; decorative text can stay if truly non-essential.

### 8. Hub sidebar text fails WCAG AA
`_hub.scss:76` — sidebar nav links `rgba(235,245,252,.6)` on `#1E4A66` (~3.3:1). Logout link at `.38` opacity (~2.2:1).

**Fix**: Raise inactive nav link opacity to `.75`+.

### 9. External links missing "opens in new window" indicator
Affects profile social links (`page-member-profiles.php:182-194`), event registration buttons (`default-template.php:108-111,155-161,269`), citizenship resources (`page-citizenship.php:128-174`), commune Wikipedia/website links (`taxonomy-tclas_commune.php:112-117`). Footer social links are correctly labelled.

**Fix**: Add `(opens in new window)` sr-only text or visual icon.

### 10. Newsletter subnav `&amp;amp;` double-encoding
`page-newsletter.php:163` — `esc_html_e( 'The Loon &amp; The Lion' )` double-escapes to `&amp;amp;`. Should be `'The Loon & The Lion'`.

### 11. `novalidate` on My Story form with no JS validation
`page-my-story.php:206` — disables browser validation on URL/month/maxlength fields. No client-side replacement. Users get no feedback until server response.

### 12. Ancestor map counts include expired members
`inc/ancestor-map.php:126-131` — queries all users with `_tclas_communes_norm` meta, not just active PMPro members. Map may show inflated counts.

**Fix**: Filter by active membership status, matching the directory's approach.

### 13. Asset versioning inconsistency (TCLAS_VERSION vs filemtime)
`inc/member-profiles.php:422,429` and `inc/ancestor-map.php:43,49` use static `TCLAS_VERSION` for cache busting while all other assets use `filemtime()`. Changes to these 4 files won't bust caches.

**Fix**: Switch to `filemtime()` for all four registrations.

### 14. `smooth-scroll` not disabled for reduced motion
`_reset.scss:6` — `html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }` has no `prefers-reduced-motion` override.

**Fix**: Add `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { html { scroll-behavior: auto; } }`

### 15. Touch targets below 44px on mobile
| Element | File:Line | Size |
|---------|-----------|------|
| Connection dismiss `.tclas-conn-dismiss` | `_connections.scss:117` | ~24x24px |
| Repeater remove `.tclas-repeater-remove` | `_story.scss:52` | 29x29px |
| Renew banner dismiss | `_header.scss:361` | ~18x18px |
| `.btn-sm` | `_buttons.scss:154` | ~32px tall |

**Fix**: Add `min-height: 44px; min-width: 44px` to these interactive elements on mobile.

### 16. Referral URL exposes `user_login`
`inc/referral.php:32-33` — uses `user_login` in the `?ref=` query string, exposing the WordPress login username.

**Fix**: Use `user_nicename` or a random referral token.

### 17. `current_time('timestamp')` deprecated since WP 5.3
`inc/national-day.php:30` — should use `current_datetime()` or `wp_date()`.

### 18. `date()` instead of `wp_date()` in events
`inc/events-integration.php:22,64` — uses PHP `date()` instead of `wp_date()`, ignoring WP timezone setting.

### 19. Commune taxonomy page enqueues Leaflet after `get_footer()`
`taxonomy-tclas_commune.php:251-252` — `wp_enqueue_style/script('leaflet')` called after footer output. The inline `<script>` at line 217 may fire before Leaflet loads (race condition). Mini-map could silently fail.

---

## MINOR (fix when convenient)

### 20. Missing `aria-label` on several landmark sections
- `front-page.php:58` — mission section
- `front-page.php:212` — quiz CTA section
- `front-page.php:225` — join bar section
- `default-template.php:105` — event sidebar `<aside>`

### 21. `index.php` pagination in `<div>` not `<nav>`
`index.php:26-34` — blog pagination uses a plain `<div>` while `archive.php` and `search.php` correctly use `<nav aria-label="...">`.

### 22. Bio textarea missing programmatic label
`page-my-story.php:251-261` — textarea has a hint paragraph but no `<label>` or `aria-labelledby`. Screen readers announce only placeholder text.

### 23. Visibility radio group missing group label
`page-my-story.php:601` — `role="radiogroup"` has no `aria-label` or `aria-labelledby`.

### 24. Featured event image alt text repeats heading
`default-template.php:231` — `alt="<?php echo esc_attr( $f_title ); ?>"` duplicates the `<h2>` below. Should be `alt=""` (decorative) or describe the image.

### 25. Post thumbnail calls missing explicit `alt`
`single-tclas_story.php:70`, `page-about.php:53`, `default-template.php:171` — `the_post_thumbnail()` / `get_the_post_thumbnail()` without `alt` key. Falls back to attachment alt which may be empty.

### 26. Member hub avatar missing alt text
`page-member-hub.php:20` — `get_avatar()` with empty alt string.

### 27. Deprecated URL in commune taxonomy
`taxonomy-tclas_commune.php:125` — links to `/member-hub/ancestral-map/` which redirects to `/ancestry/`. Extra HTTP roundtrip.

### 28. Duplicate surname cluster keys in connection data
`inc/connection-data.php` — `'hansen'` defined at lines 569 and 597; `'welter'` at lines 581 and 662. PHP silently uses the last occurrence, losing variants from the first.

### 29. Umlaut expansion too broad
`inc/connections.php:126` — `strtr($norm, ['u'=>'ue','o'=>'oe','a'=>'ae'])` replaces every vowel, not just umlauts. "muller" becomes "mueelleer".

### 30. `display: contents` on footer `<p>` may break a11y tree
`_footer.scss:87` — `display: contents` on `<p>` elements removes them from the a11y tree in Safari < 17.4.

### 31. Slideshow `setInterval` not paused on tab visibility change
`hero-slideshow.js:71-82` — interval runs while tab is hidden. Returning to tab may cause burst transitions.

### 32. No debounce on directory search input
`member-profiles.js:150` — filter runs on every keystroke. Fine at current scale but good practice to add 150ms debounce.

### 33. Photo remove has no `.catch()` handler
`member-profiles.js:64-80` — AJAX failure leaves UI in inconsistent state.

### 34. `window.location.reload()` when all connections dismissed
`main.js:351-354` — jarring full reload. Could inject empty-state HTML client-side instead.

### 35. SPARQL injection via `esc_sql()` (wrong escaping function)
`inc/lod-audio.php:79` — `esc_sql()` doesn't protect SPARQL queries. Low practical risk since input comes from the official commune index, but wrong pattern.

### 36. `init` hook seeds taxonomy terms on every page load
`inc/taxonomies.php:93-115` — calls `term_exists()` 10x per request. Should gate behind an option flag or move to activation hook.

### 37. Inline styles on commune taxonomy page
`taxonomy-tclas_commune.php:70,95,100,124,135,193` — multiple inline `style` attributes. Should be BEM classes.

### 38. Hardcoded hex colors scattered across SCSS
`_connections.scss:114`, `_connections.scss:147-148`, `_forms.scss:42`, `_hero.scss:32`, `tclas-ancestor-map.scss:19,54` — use raw hex instead of CSS custom properties.

---

## ENHANCEMENTS (nice to have)

### 39. Add structured data for events
`default-template.php` — single event view has all needed fields but no Event JSON-LD. TEC's native schema may be lost since this is a full template override.

### 40. Add Open Graph / Twitter Card meta tags
No OG or TC meta anywhere. Shared links use platform-default previews. Especially valuable for newsletter articles and events.

### 41. Add breadcrumbs to pillar pages
Newsletter issue pages and events have breadcrumbs. Pillar pages (Citizenship, MSP+LUX, Ancestry, Join, About) do not.

### 42. Add `color-scheme: light` to `:root`
Prevents system dark mode from inverting form controls and scrollbars.

### 43. Add Leaflet map text alternative
`tclas-ancestor-map.js` — map is keyboard-inaccessible. A toggleable "View as list" showing communes with counts would serve screen reader users.

### 44. Add `meta name="description"` for pillar pages
Without an SEO plugin, search engines auto-extract snippets. The pillar pages have strong ledes that could be surfaced.

### 45. Add print stylesheet polish
`_utilities.scss:180-185` hides header/footer but doesn't address newsletter navs, hero images, maps, or column layouts.

### 46. Log Mailchimp API failures
`inc/pmpro-integration.php:59-61,145-147` — exceptions are silently swallowed. An `error_log()` would help diagnose signup/unsubscribe failures.

### 47. Cron uses `strtotime()` instead of WP timezone-aware function
`inc/connections.php:615` — `strtotime('tomorrow 02:00:00')` uses PHP server timezone, not WP timezone.

---

## THINGS DONE WELL

The theme has strong accessibility foundations worth preserving:

- Skip link (fix the duplication, keep one)
- `lang="lb"` on all Luxembourgish content
- `aria-hidden="true"` + `focusable="false"` on decorative SVGs
- `aria-label` on navigation landmarks (primary, mobile, footer, newsletter, breadcrumbs)
- `aria-expanded` + `aria-controls` on interactive toggles
- `role="alert"` + `aria-live="polite"` on dynamic content (save messages, char counter, photo upload, directory count)
- `role="table"` with proper row/cell/header roles on MSP+LUX comparison tables
- `prefers-reduced-motion` support in SCSS and JS
- `:focus-visible` global outline
- Proper output escaping throughout
- `rel="noopener noreferrer"` on all external links
- Consistent translatable strings
- `filemtime()` cache busting (mostly)
- Well-stratified z-index values (no conflicts)
- `loading="lazy"` / `loading="eager"` used appropriately
